companies.description: Ranked list of prospect companies, sorted by ICP fit score descending.

employee_count.description: Estimated employee count. Null if unknown.

icp_fit_score.description: Composite ICP fit score used for ranking.

primary_contact.description: Best available contact at the company for outreach.

notes.description: Brief notes on why this company was included, any timing signals, or CRM flags.

crm_flag.description: CRM status note (e.g., 'IN PIPELINE', 'PREVIOUSLY LOST', null if clean).

total_found.description: Total number of companies returned before any deduplication.

filters_applied.description: The exact filter values used to build this list.

crm_duplicates_excluded.description: Number of companies removed because they matched existing CRM customer records.

list_quality_notes.description: Summary of quality issues, coverage gaps, or filter adjustments made during list construction.
